get.summary: Public active design profile (accepts ?locale= for localized sections)
Public block catalog: typed-block library (types, variants, fields, defaults, icons)
Public catalog of saved section patterns (the capture library)
Get a saved section pattern (full spec)
UI chrome strings (nav/footer/buttons) for a locale
Serve a self-hosted media file (blog images, etc.) from the media volume

post.summary: Generate design profile from industry and competitor URLs, or apply a style preset
Analyze competitor websites and update active design profile

get.summary: List blocks on a page (target = 'home' or a page slug; ?locale= for a locale copy)

post.summary: Add a block (type, variant, content, position) or insert a saved {pattern}; ?locale= edits that locale

patch.summary: Update a block (variant and/or content; content deep-merges)

post.summary: Move a block (position: start | end | index | after:<id> | before:<id>)
Apply many block ops in one call (add/update/move/duplicate/remove); atomic by default

get.summary: List every editable surface (home + all pages) with their blocks and available locales

post.summary: Save a section as a reusable pattern (full spec, or capture {target, blockId} off a page)

patch.summary: Edit UI chrome strings for a locale (merges; {replace:true} overwrites)
